output_debit_classifier.reason: Mondelez purchased a meal for $125 using the corporate credit card. The meal was provided to employees working overtime as an employee benefit. Under IFRS (IAS 19), employee benefits include short-term benefits such as meals provided during work. This cost should be recognized as an employee benefit expense (or alternatively as part of salaries and wages expense). The corporate credit card purchase creates a liability (Credit Card Payable) that will be settled when the credit card bill is paid. No tax is mentioned in the transaction, so no tax lines are added.
